content:
As you write your compare and contrast ideas for this week's initial discussion post, I encourage you to consider the things you've purchased or aspects of your life that lend themselves well to comparison and contrast. It could be anything, from the different hobbies you enjoy to the contrasting personalities of your friends. It could even include the diverse cuisines you've tried. The options are limitless, so let your imagination run wild!

Click Next to read the Week 4 Learning Outcomes.

Week 4 | Learning Outcomes

Learning Outcomes
Course Learning Outcomes
Upon successful completion of this module, you will be able to:

CO1: Write using proper grammar, punctuation, and spelling.
CO3: Recognize essay types, such as personal narrative, process analysis, comparison and contrast, and persuasion essays.
CO4: Explain and demonstrate steps in the writing process.
Week 4 Learning Outcomes
You will demonstrate understanding through the ability to:

Identify parts of speech, proper capitalization, and end punctuation. (CO1)
